Tweaks.description: Runtime-tunable knobs consumed by frontend + server. All have hard-coded fallback defaults if tweaks.cfg fetch fails.

MessagesQuery.description: The ONLY valid query shape for GET /session/:id/message.

before.description: Older-than-this messageID. When present, returns limit messages strictly older than this ID, chronological.

Message.description: Opaque — structure lives in existing session schema. Included here only as reference.

PartScopedFetchResponse.description: New endpoint: GET /session/:id/message/:msgID/part/:partID — returns one full part.

ClientStoreInvariants.description: Runtime invariants enforced by global-sync reducer. Not wire; for test vectors.

liveStreamingSet.description: Set of messageIDs currently streaming. These are NEVER evicted by LRU.

forbiddenFields.description: Fields that MUST NOT appear anywhere in store: lastEventID, resumeCursor, forceRefetchPending
